process_details: Physical mixture (mortar/pestle 60 s) melted in aluminum dish at 441.15 K for 5 min, then quench cooled by pouring liquid nitrogen onto sample; stored over P2O5 until room temperature; gently milled with mortar and pestle.
notes: Excess NAP recrystallized at 4 °C (Figure 6 shows distinct NAP peak at 19.1° already at 4 °C).
